title: Crazy Desire

actors: Ugo Tognazzi, Catherine Spaak, Béatrice Altariba
plot: A middle-aged and slightly conservative businessman meets a band of rowdy youths and is smitten by one named Francesca. He is pursuaded to join their party and even pay for most of it, as he finds himself strangely attracted to Fr...
